device_uid: String: Required: Unique identifier of the device or repository being assessed.
hostname: String: Required: Primary hostname of the device or name of the repository being assessed.
source: String: Required: Name of the platform or tool this data came from e.g. Dependabot, Snyk, GitHub, Qualys, Nessus. Write the name directly, not a variable.
asset_type: String: Required: Type of asset being assessed. Values: Device, Repository, Container, Application.
patch_status: String: Required: Overall patch compliance status of this device or asset. Values: Up to date, Updates pending, Critical missing, Unknown.
last_patch_time: String: Optional: Timestamp of the last patch or update applied in ISO 8601 format.
pending_patches_count: Integer: Optional: Total number of patches or updates pending application.
critical_patches_count: Integer: Optional: Number of critical severity patches pending application.
patch_sla_breached: Boolean: Optional: Indicates whether critical patches have exceeded the allowed remediation timeframe. True = SLA breached, False = within SLA.
os_name: String: Optional: Operating system name e.g. Windows, Linux, macOS.
os_version: String: Optional: Current operating system version or build number.
os_end_of_life: Boolean: Optional: Indicates whether the operating system version is end of life and no longer receiving security updates. True = end of life.

vulnerabilities_summary.total: Integer: Required: Total number of vulnerabilities found on this asset.
vulnerabilities_summary.critical: Integer: Required: Number of critical severity vulnerabilities.
vulnerabilities_summary.high: Integer: Required: Number of high severity vulnerabilities.
vulnerabilities_summary.medium: Integer: Required: Number of medium severity vulnerabilities.
vulnerabilities_summary.low: Integer: Required: Number of low severity vulnerabilities.
vulnerabilities_summary.exploited_in_wild: Integer: Optional: Number of vulnerabilities known to be actively exploited.

top_vulnerabilities: Array: Optional: List of the most critical vulnerabilities found. Each item contains cve_uid, name, severity, fix_available, affected_package.

repo_security.name: String: Optional: Name of the GitHub repository if this is a repository assessment.
repo_security.dependabot_enabled: Boolean: Optional: Indicates whether Dependabot is enabled for automated vulnerability detection.
repo_security.dependabot_alerts_open: Integer: Optional: Number of open Dependabot security alerts.
repo_security.dependabot_alerts_critical: Integer: Optional: Number of critical Dependabot alerts requiring immediate action.
repo_security.code_scanning_enabled: Boolean: Optional: Indicates whether code scanning is enabled on this repository.
repo_security.secret_scanning_enabled: Boolean: Optional: Indicates whether secret scanning is enabled on this repository.
repo_security.last_dependency_scan: String: Optional: Timestamp of the last dependency vulnerability scan in ISO 8601 format.

overall_vulnerability_status: String: Required: Overall vulnerability management status of this asset. Values: Compliant, Non-Compliant, Critical, Unknown.
findings: Array: Required: List of specific vulnerability issues found. Empty array means compliant. Each item is a string describing the issue e.g. Critical CVE unpatched for 30 days.
risk_score: Integer: Required: Risk score 0-100 indicating overall vulnerability risk. 0 = fully patched and protected, 100 = critical unpatched vulnerabilities.
risk_level: String: Required: Human-readable risk level. Values: LOW, MEDIUM, HIGH, CRITICAL.
remediation_priority: String: Optional: Recommended remediation priority for this asset. Values: Immediate, Within 7 days, Within 30 days, Scheduled.
device_managed: Boolean: Optional: Indicates whether device is managed by corporate tooling. True = managed, False = unmanaged.
device_type: String: Optional: Type of device or asset e.g. Laptop, Server, Container, Repository.

org.name: String: Optional: Name of the organization or tenant this asset belongs to.
org.uid: String: Optional: Unique identifier of the organization.

metadata.version: String: Required: OCSF schema version e.g. 1.0.0.
metadata.uid: String: Optional: Original record UID in the source system. If no relevant ID exists keep blank.
metadata.logged_time: String: Optional: Time this record was generated in ISO 8601 format.

product.name: String: Required: Name of the scanning tool this data came from e.g. Dependabot, Snyk, Nessus, GitHub. Write the name directly not a variable.
product.vendor_name: String: Optional: Name of the vendor that owns the scanning tool.

custom_attributes.comments: Array: Optional: Array of objects with fields author, timestamp, text representing analyst comments.
custom_attributes.tlp: Integer: Optional: Traffic Light Protocol classification. Default: 2.
custom_attributes.custom_fields: Object: Optional: Arbitrary key-value pairs for vendor-specific or workflow-specific fields.
custom_attributes.assignee: String: Optional: Email or identifier of the analyst responsible for remediating this asset.
